design_blueprint.core_philosophy: Transform the generic flat UI into a high-end, high-density SaaS 'Command Center'. Replace the cluttered 9 horizontal top tabs with a scalable dark-themed left sidebar. Use pure white data surfaces with delicate 1px borders on a zinc-50 canvas to maximize clarity and readability for legal/marketing operations.

headings.usage: Page titles, card headers, section dividers.

data_and_metrics.family: JetBrains Mono or IBM Plex Mono
data_and_metrics.usage: Use strictly for all table numbers, revenue, stats, percentages, and phone numbers to ensure vertical alignment and quick scanning.

color_system.sidebar: bg-zinc-950 (#09090B) with white/zinc-300 text to create a striking, sleek premium contrast.
color_system.primary_brand: bg-[#0A1128] text-white (Deep Obsidian Navy - modernized from the legacy #0F1B3D)
color_system.accent_danger: bg-rose-600 text-white (Modernized, elegant version of flat red #EF4444)

layout_strategy.paradigm_shift: Eliminate the 9 top tabs. Implement a Fixed Left Sidebar (w-64) for all primary navigation to improve scalability.

sidebar_navigation.header: Top of sidebar: 'The Lemon Pros' text with a lucide-react Lemon/Scale icon. Sleek white text.
sidebar_navigation.footer: Pin the current username and Role Badge (Owner/Editor/View Only) at the absolute bottom of the sidebar with a Logout action.

top_header.contents: Left: Dynamic Page Breadcrumbs / Page Title. Right: Global controls like Date-Range Filter pills.

layout_strategy.spacing_density: Use p-8 for main page containers. Use tight gap-4 or gap-6 for bento grid dashboard layouts.

component_styling.cards: Flat background (bg-white), rounded-lg (max 8px radius), border border-zinc-200, shadow-sm. NO heavy drop shadows or generic float effects.
component_styling.stat_cards: Bento Grid styling. Include a subtle sparkline or trend indicator (e.g., '+12%'). Value must be in large font-mono text-3xl or 4xl.
component_styling.tables: Shadcn Table customized. Tight padding (py-3 px-4). Hover state explicitly defined (hover:bg-zinc-50/70). Sticky headers. Empty states must have a centered icon and text.
component_styling.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium border
component_styling.buttons: rounded-md. Primary: bg-[#0A1128]. Secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-50. Ghost: hover:bg-zinc-100.

analytics.warning_banner: When Google Ads is disconnected: Full-width banner injected directly below the header. Style: bg-amber-50 border-y border-amber-200 text-amber-800 py-3 px-6 flex items-center gap-3. Add a pulsing warning icon.
analytics.data_tables: Google Ads tables (Campaign -> Ad Group -> Keyword) should utilize Shadcn tables with sorting carets. Keep numbers strictly mono-spaced.

funnel.visualization: Use Shadcn/Recharts to render a horizontal step chart or bar chart visualizing drop-off (Landing -> 7 steps -> Submitted). Apply a gradient or color scale from Navy (Start) to Emerald (Converted).

split_test.layout: Display as a Bento grid of dense cards. Each card contains the test name, status pill, entry URL with a copy button, and a mini stats table comparing Variant A vs B. Highlight the winner with a subtle border glow (ring-1 ring-amber-400).

pages_cms.layout: Two-column split view (grid-cols-12). Left (col-span-4 or 5): Dense Shadcn Form fields for editing copy/hooks. Right (col-span-7 or 8): Sticky live iframe preview of the landing page wrapper inside a generic rounded browser-chrome frame (border-8 border-zinc-100 bg-white rounded-xl).

leads.interaction_critical: Clicking a lead DOES NOT open a standard modal/dialog (which blocks context). It opens a right-side Shadcn Sheet (Drawer) (w-[500px] or wider). This allows the user to see the table while interacting with the lead.
leads.revenue_panel: Inside the Lead Sheet: A distinct highlighted card (bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200 p-4 rounded-lg) containing the 'Mark as Sold & Send Conversion' action. Use an Emerald CTA button.

calls.live_badge: Next to the Calls title, inject a pulsing UI indicator: a small dot with an outer ping animation (animate-ping absolute bg-sky-400 opacity-75, inside relative bg-sky-500) labeled 'LIVE'.

motion_and_microinteractions.hover_states: Every interactive element must explicitly define its hover state (e.g. hover:text-zinc-900). Avoid default gray-on-gray bleeding.
motion_and_microinteractions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out on buttons, table rows, and sidebar links.
motion_and_microinteractions.toasts: Integrate Sonner for toasts. Position bottom-right. Use sleek white toasts with a left colored border based on the event type (emerald for save success, rose for error).

testing_and_implementation_rules.file_format: Strictly use .js and .jsx extensions. DO NOT use .ts or .tsx.
testing_and_implementation_rules.data_testid: ALL interactive elements, tabs, buttons, forms, metric displays, and table rows MUST have a stable `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case based on their role (e.g., `data-testid='leads-table-row'`, `data-testid='google-ads-warning'`).
testing_and_implementation_rules.icons: Use lucide-react exclusively. Set stroke width to 1.5 for a sharper, sleeker aesthetic.
testing_and_implementation_rules.components: Use and heavily customize Shadcn UI primitives. Modify classes directly in the component to match this sleek zinc-based guideline instead of relying on default generic styles.
